name: OpenProse Memory
description: Cross-session memory recall for opt-in OpenProse patterns. SQLite + FTS5 over compacted session summaries; activation gated by pattern frontmatter `memory: cross-session`.

enabled.label: Memory Recall
enabled.help: Globally enable or pause cross-session recall. Patterns still need `memory: cross-session` in frontmatter to actually receive recall.

sessionsDbCapMB.label: Sessions DB cap (MB)
sessionsDbCapMB.help: Soft cap per agentId. When breached, oldest rows by last_recall_ts are dropped. Default 1024.

tracesRetentionDays.label: Trace retention (days)
tracesRetentionDays.help: Default TTL for trace JSONL files under traces/. Default 30. Per-pattern override via frontmatter `evolve.traceRetentionDays`.

redactPII.label: Redact PII (email/phone/CC)
redactPII.help: Off by default. Bearer tokens are always scrubbed regardless of this flag.

summarizerModel.label: Summarizer model
summarizerModel.help: Provider/model used to compact session transcripts into searchable summaries. Defaults to the agent's primary model.

recallDefaultK.label: Default recall k
recallDefaultK.help: Top-k recall results returned when a pattern does not specify k. Default 5.
